envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Recommendations are PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED. User must confirm own role; admin approval at D4 mandatory before Twin capability activation.

items.name: Role Map Recommendation
items.description: Ranks proposed Role Map regions consuming Role Map Assessment output candidates. Includes role-template match confidence + day-one Twin capability candidates + first-week aha moments + sensitive-scope exclusions.
items.human_readable_summary: Proposes role-template match + day-one Twin capabilities + first-week aha moments per user. Sensitive scopes excluded at assessment remain absolute.
items.model_usage_notes: Role-template match confidence depends on Wave 2.1 role-depth file coverage. DEEP roles (6 of 21) get HIGH_CONFIDENCE template matches; SUBSTANTIVE roles (15 of 21) get MEDIUM. Out-of-catalog roles get LOW + REQUIRES_USER_CONFIRMATION.

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: User confirms role match before Twin capability activation.
Day-one capabilities require admin policy approval before activation.
Aha moments per Wave 2.1 §22; user confirms before surfacing.
Sensitive scopes excluded at intake remain absolute downstream.

items.rationale: Role-template match confirmation must precede capability activation. First-week aha moments depend on confirmed role + admin-approved capabilities. Sensitive-scope exclusions inherit from Risk Map.
cross_map_dependencies: Role Map depends on Company Map (initial-rollout departments bound role scope)
Role Map depends on Org Map (manager + direct-reports relationships)
Tool Map references Role Map (per-role tool usage per Wave 2.1 §24)
Memory / DMW Map references Role Map (per-role DMW scope per Wave 2.1 §25)
items.approval_gate_required: User confirmation + admin policy approval at D4 per ADR-0082 Amendment 1.
DMW_scope_implications: Role Map bounds Role-scoped DMW memory per Wave 2.1 §25
Sensitive scopes excluded at assessment remain excluded at DMW activation
Twin day-one capabilities map to allowed DMW categories per OOTB role-depth
governance_review_points: User must confirm own role before Twin activation
Admin must approve every Role Map region before capability lights up
No workforce-scoring inferences from role + responsibility data
safe_defaults: OOTB role-depth defaults as starter priors
